problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
